item.dc:creator: LesbianRedwings

item.title: my dad makes cakes. thought I’d show them off…
item.description:
Orange and hazelnut entremet.
Chocolate, lemon mini-pastries with a touch of coffee.
“Simple” fruit and almond entremet.
Chocolate mousse entremet with lemon-yuzu marmalade.
Chocolate mousse, mango, pineapple, and hazelnut entremet.
Pistachio and sour cherry mini-pastries. Yes, they are every bit as good as they look. No, he has absolutely nothing to sell or promote. He has a full time job he very much enjoys, this is just his hobby and he wants to see what people think. @anatoliy500 on Instagram if you want to see what he comes up with next…

item.title: Title
item.description:
Felt run down, sick and generally rough for weeks. Went to the doctor who did a blood test. Results confirmed that she has a growth. Had a scan of her abdomen and found it. Extremely invasive and quick growing, will likely change how she has to live her life for years to come. Trying to get surgery to remove it but can’t until mid to late November.
Hi Imgur, I’m dad! ?

item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: I know you can easily look them up online and watch them in full - that's not the point.
item.description: These hearings may be the most consequential Congressional hearings in the history of our country, and so many people are tuned out & apathetic, that the only way you're going to get them to watch any, is by presenting it as an entertainment option on a platform they're already looking at, to be entertained. (Yes, it's sad that that's where we are as a country. But that IS where we are, so it's probably best to work within the confines of that reality.) It doesn't do much good to air (some of) the hearings on primetime TV, if a huge contingent of people don't ever watch TV. I think doing something like this, could help increase the number of people who see it - I hope those companies consider doing it.
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

I guess
I've made a huge mistake
I'm an adult
I'm high as fuck
I'm in my prime
I'm too old for this shit
I'm your Huckleberry
Nerd
Never
Jaw drop
Ouuh yeah
poc poc poc
shy
tired
suspicious
This is fine
I'm a unitard
wait what
wink
